summary: Created the governed SpecBridge v2 serious product-build pilot. SpecBridge v1 now records the starter, issue anchor, execution contract, scope manifest, documentation, Claude Code runtime evidence, and final report for issue #255. Claude Code was used first to create a separate local specbridge-v2 repository MVP at D:\Antigravity\Infinite Process\specbridge-v2. Codex then verified the v2 tests, git state, file list, and ASCII posture. The v2 MVP includes context files, AGENTS policy, README, a bootstrap execution contract, scope manifest, final report fixture, PowerShell validator, and local tests.
validations: claude -p SpecBridge v2 local MVP launch: passed
SpecBridge v2 git status clean: passed
policy_result: Within policy for the active contract. The work stayed inside declared v1 governance artifacts plus the explicitly authorized local sibling v2 workspace. Claude Code was used first for v2 implementation. No specbridge-v2 GitHub repository was created, no remote was pushed or configured, no dependency installation occurred, and no secrets, production configuration, billing, authentication, authorization, database, CI/CD workflow, deployment, hosted runtime, mutation-capable MCP, cleanup enforcement, retention enforcement, or Qwen integration work occurred.
risk_result: Medium. The pilot created a separate local repository and launched Claude Code, but the blast radius was bounded by a local-only workspace, no external v2 mutation, no dependencies, and deterministic local validation. SpecBridge v1 remained the evidence source.
unresolved_risks: The v2 repository is local only; no GitHub repository, PR, or CI exists for v2 yet.
SpecBridge v1 scope validation cannot enforce paths inside the sibling v2 repository; enforcement is recorded through contract boundary, runtime evidence, and Codex verification.
The v2 MVP is intentionally small and does not yet implement GitHub orchestration, runtime launch planning, MCP, multi-agent handoff, Qwen-AgentWorld simulation, or hosted execution.
merge_status: Not merged. v1 work is on branch codex/issue-255-serious-product-build-pilot and requires a PR, CI, review, and explicit operator merge authority before merge.
